keeper: Time separates the daughter from her mother. Provenance keeps them related. The chamber makes the daughter thinkable.

definitions.eidron: A bounded distinction that persists sufficiently for the claim that it is to become thinkable and receiptable.
definitions.mother_or_source: The prior Eidron, carrier state, or generative boundary from which a daughter Eidron arises.
definitions.daughter: A newly distinguished Eidron that is not identical to its mother while retaining the mother as provenance.
definitions.quotient_chamber: A bounded comparison surface that exposes an admissible description of a larger carrier without exhausting it.
definitions.CIK: Cosmic Interpretive Knot, a bounded classification chamber for Eidrons that receive and interpret cosmic traces.
definitions.lower_carrier: The continuing state beneath quotient-visible samples that preserves orientation, history, and transition continuity.
definitions.quartz_socket_t: The user-declared input socket through which quartz scales successive measurement occasions.
definitions.output_socket_I: The user-declared output socket through which a quotient-visible daughter state becomes receiptable.

classification_contract.meaning: Scott is admissibly describable within the Cosmic Interpretive Knot chamber.

source_daughter_contract.quartz_role: Quartz scales and addresses measurement occasions only.
source_daughter_contract.admission_role: The chamber grammar decides whether a sampled distinction is admitted as a daughter Eidron.

finite_proof_obligations.statement: The daughter output is distinguishable from its source.
The daughter retains a receiptable source relation.
A declared transition law determines the next lower-carrier state.
The output is a bounded quotient projection of the updated lower carrier.
Closed-path comparison is independent of the arbitrary held initial seed.
Any claimed native realization must replay an exact x_sigma row under the derived carrier law.

open_derivation.target: Derive T_t and M from bounded native provenance such that all proof obligations pass.
open_derivation.unresolved_bridge: (source state, lower carrier, t) -> updated carrier -> I

boundary: The t and I orientation is user-declared for this fork.
Choice of sockets does not itself prove a native path law.
CIK is a bounded classification chamber, not a total identity.
Quartz supplies scaled timing and measurement address only.
No lower-carrier update or projection law is derived here.
No Eidron theorem, native generator, physics, force, or Gap A closure claim.
